name: Applied Materials, Inc.
description: Applied Materials, Inc. is a global leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce virtually every new chip and advanced display in the world. The company provides manufacturing equipment, services, and software to the semiconductor, display, and related industries. Its expertise in modifying materials at atomic levels and on an industrial scale enables customers to transform possibilities into reality. Applied Materials plays a critical role in the advancement of technology by helping chipmakers improve performance, power, and cost for the electronics that power the modern world.
